description: AI pipeline that generates 8 custom prospect assets after Call 1 to increase Call 2 show rates for Quantum Scaling reps

project_overview.what: Deal Forge is an internal sales tool for Quantum Scaling reps. After completing a Call 1 (Business Audit), the rep triggers the app with the Fireflies meeting ID. An AI pipeline extracts the prospect's ICP and business context, then generates 8 custom assets: a verified lead list, interactive Google Calendar invite visual, a live webinar experience mock, 3 webinar title options, an interactive ROI calculator pre-populated with their numbers, a prospect research profile, and brand-scraped visual identity. All assets are ready before Call 2.
project_overview.why: QS's Call 2 show rate is 37.5% — the core constraint on revenue. Prospects feel informed after Call 1 and have no strong pull to return. Deal Forge creates a concrete bridge: assets so specific to the prospect that skipping Call 2 means walking away from something already built for them. The 'sunk cost' and perceived value dramatically increase show rate and close rate.
project_overview.end_state: A polished internal rep dashboard used for every Call 2 booking. Rep selects today's calls from auto-loaded Fireflies meetings, clicks Generate, and has a full asset package ready within 20 minutes. The ROI model and reg page mock have shareable prospect-facing URLs. Eventually expands to full CRM integration and automated follow-up.
project_overview.current_summary: Phase 2 backend live on Railway. Full 8-task pipeline deployed. Rep portal live at deal-forge-production.up.railway.app. Key systems confirmed working: (1) Fireflies transcript lookup — 6-pass search strategy (GHL name → company → email segments → domain → recent scan p1 → p2), prefers exact email match → domain match → loose keyword. (2) GHL contact lookup — enriches contactInfo with name/company/title before Fireflies search for better matching. (3) extractBriefFromTranscript — Claude Sonnet extracts full structured brief: prospect info, ICP (apollo_titles, apollo_industries, apollo_employee_ranges, apollo_geography, person_seniorities), metrics (LTV/close/show rate), angle (pain/result/methodology/proof), verbatim quotes, situation, context, webinar title seeds. (4) /api/prefetch endpoint — runs Fireflies + GHL + website scrape + Claude extraction before job creation so rep can review the brief. (5) All 8 task handlers wired: extract, prospect_research, brand_scrape, lead_list, webinar_titles, roi_model, calendar_visual, webinar_mock. Main blocker: lead_list EU Apollo coverage — org search returns 0 for Baltic/EU ICPs. Latest fix deployed (commit c934325): strip 'Europe' from geo (invalid Apollo value), EU country list retry with no AND-logic industry filter, geoUsed flag tells classifier to accept EU-wide companies. Unconfirmed — stopped testing to avoid rate limit loop.

resume_here: Phase 2 backend deployed. Full Fireflies→brief pipeline confirmed working. lead_list is the remaining blocker for EU/Baltic ICPs — returns 0 leads. Latest fix committed (c934325): EU org retry uses explicit country list with geo+size only (no AND-logic industry filter), geoUsed flag tells classifier to accept EU-wide companies. NOT yet confirmed working — stopped testing to avoid Apollo rate limit loop. Next session: (1) trigger one fresh job for rait@planpro.ee, (2) check Railway logs for which Apollo tier fires and what HTTP status/org count comes back, (3) if still 0, test people/search direct with person_locations as fallback path.

current_phase.name: Phase 2 - Build & Test
current_phase.goal: Debug lead_list EU Apollo coverage, confirm full pipeline end-to-end with real Call 1 transcripts, then polish rep portal UI.
current_focus: lead_list task returning 0 leads for Baltic/EU ICPs (rait@planpro.ee test case) — latest fix c934325 not yet confirmed working
Everything else confirmed working: Fireflies 6-pass transcript lookup, GHL contact enrichment, website scrape, Claude brief extraction, all 8 task handlers wired
immediate_next_steps: Fresh session: trigger one real job for rait@planpro.ee, watch Railway logs — need to see which Apollo org search tier fires and what count it returns
If Apollo EU org search still 0: try people/search direct with person_locations (person-level geo, separate from org search) — may have better EU coverage
Run end-to-end test with a US/NA-based prospect ICP to confirm pipeline works outside EU — isolates whether 0-leads issue is EU-specific
Once lead_list confirmed: run full 8-task e2e on a real QS Call 1 transcript and review all asset outputs
Rep portal UI polish — currently functional but unstyled

known_issues.title: lead_list returns 0 leads for Baltic/EU ICPs — Apollo org search returns 0 even with explicit EU country list + geo+size only filter
Apollo q_organization_keyword_tags uses AND logic — multiple industry tags returns 0 EU results. Workaround deployed: EU retry drops industry filter entirely.
In-process job worker — jobs lost on Railway redeploy if in-flight. Jobs persist in Supabase but processing promise is killed.

next_phase.name: Phase 2 - Build & Test
next_phase.goal: Build the Node.js worker, task handlers for all 8 tasks, and deploy to Railway. Internal test with 2-3 real Call 1 transcripts.
key_features: Job queue worker with atomic task claiming (UPDATE...RETURNING)
Stage 2: brand_scrape, lead_list, webinar_titles, roi_model handlers (parallel)
Supabase Storage upload for all HTML assets (roi_model, calendar_visual, webinar_mock)
HTML templates for ROI calculator, Google Calendar mock, and live webinar experience mock
tools_and_apis: Ample Leads REST API (or Apify actor)
next_phase.prerequisites: /task-spec complete for all 8 tasks. /ux-design complete. Ample Leads credentials obtained.

future_phases.name: Phase 3 - Rep Dashboard UI
future_phases.goal: Build the Next.js frontend: job list, asset cards, shareable links, real-time status polling.
future_phases.prerequisites: Phase 2 worker deployed and tested with real transcripts

future_phases.name: Phase 4 - GHL Integration
future_phases.goal: Auto-trigger Deal Forge when a Call 2 appointment is booked in GHL. Push shareable asset links back to the GHL contact record.

recent_milestones.description: Problem validated: Call 2 show rate 37.5% confirmed as core revenue constraint
8-task pipeline architecture designed and approved (batch-design + state-machine)
Cost check passed: ~$0.05-$0.08/job, ~$5-8/month at scale
Schema designed, reviewed, and applied to Supabase (sales_assets schema, jobs + tasks tables)
Supabase Storage bucket sales-assets created
Fireflies API isolated and validated — Notes field confirmed as primary extraction source
/task-spec skill created — mandatory 11-section gate before any task code is written
extract task fully specced (all 11 sections)
webinar_titles task fully specced (all 11 sections, 300-word limit, needs_input status, format brain architecture)
24 QS case studies scraped from due-diligence site and written to Lloyd OS Brain — Consulting x7, Software x5, Coaching x7, Agencies x5
prospect_research task specced (LinkedIn-only, Claude bio synthesis, jobs.research_data output)
brand_scrape task specced (Apify web-scraper, color extraction priority order, jobs.brand_data output)
lead_list task specced — 5-step pipeline with deterministic website quality gate, Apollo.io API (replaced Ample Leads), company_size in output
roi_model task specced — no LLM call, pure template-fill + math, interactive HTML, rep edits live on Call 2, shareable prospect URL
calendar_visual task specced — Google Calendar popup mock, webinar copy injected from prior tasks, Haiku generates 3 reminder emails, Yes click reveals email sequence
webinar_mock task specced — live webinar experience simulator, 2 branded slides, AI-generated ICP live chat (18 messages), LIVE badge + attendee count
Phase 1 spec gate complete — all 8 pipeline tasks fully specced. Ready for /ux-design and Phase 2 build.
Phase 2 backend built and deployed to Railway — full 8-task pipeline live, GHL webhook, Fireflies lookup, rep portal at deal-forge-production.up.railway.app
Fireflies 6-pass transcript lookup confirmed working: GHL name → company → email segments → domain → recent scan (p1+p2). Prefers exact email attendee → domain attendee → loose keyword match.

extractBriefFromTranscript confirmed working: Claude Sonnet extracts full structured brief with 8 top-level sections — prospect, icp (incl. apollo_titles, apollo_industries, apollo_employee_ranges, apollo_geography, person_seniorities), metrics, angle, verbatim, situation, context, titles.
/api/prefetch endpoint confirmed working: GHL lookup + Fireflies + website scrape + Claude extraction in one call. Rep reviews brief before confirming job.
lead_list pipeline hardened: no-name filter, enterprise employee ranges, anyMatch outage detection (vs genuine rejection), geo cleanup (strip 'European Union'), classifier geo hard-reject rule

Apollo AND-logic bug identified: q_organization_keyword_tags with 5 industry values returns 0 EU results. EU retry now uses geo+size only (no industry filter), geoUsed flag tells classifier to accept EU-wide companies.

decision_log.decision: Separate Supabase project (not shared with QS Dashboard)
decision_log.reasoning: Every existing app has its own Supabase project. Sharing would mix concerns and compete for connection limits.

decision_log.decision: Hard delete on jobs (no soft delete)
decision_log.reasoning: Job records are operational queue state, not compliance records. Assets persist in Supabase Storage independently.

decision_log.decision: ROI model built as interactive HTML page (not spreadsheet)
decision_log.reasoning: Opens in browser alongside other assets. Pre-populated with extracted LTV. Progressive disclosure rep view + shareable prospect view (?view=prospect).

decision_log.decision: lead_list uses 4-step sub-pipeline (ICP extraction → lead fetch → website crawl → ICP match filter)
decision_log.reasoning: Raw Apify/Ample Leads results are low quality (~50% irrelevant). Website crawl + Claude ICP classification filters to 25 verified matches.
All 5 Stage 2 tasks need this data. Writing to the job record makes it accessible without joins through the tasks table.

decision_log.decision: Webinar slides cut from asset list
decision_log.reasoning: Gamma has no API. Slides require full narrative depth impossible from a 30-min call.

decision_log.decision: lead_list uses Apollo.io People Search API directly — Ample Leads (Apify) dropped
decision_log.reasoning: Dev team already has Apollo credits. Direct API is cleaner than Apify actor wrapper — better documented, no actor ID uncertainty, no additional Apify cost layer.

decision_log.decision: prospect_research = LinkedIn only. brand_scrape = website only.
decision_log.reasoning: Original spec had prospect_research scraping both sources, creating overlap with brand_scrape. Clean separation: one source per task, no redundant HTTP calls.

decision_log.decision: reg_page replaced by webinar_mock (live webinar experience simulator)
decision_log.reasoning: Calendar invite IS the registration mechanism — showing a reg page alongside it creates cognitive dissonance ('just click Yes' vs 'also fill out this form'). webinar_mock is more powerful: shows the prospect their brand applied to the full webinar experience (slides + live chat), creating the 'oh shit' moment. Same brand data is used, better outcome.
